studyName: Gene Expression in an African American Schizophrenia Dataset

tables.description: Sample ID, LCL cell count, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, tumor status of sample, and histological type of sample obtained from participants with or without schizophrenia and involved in the "Gene Expression in an African American Schizophrenia Dataset" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type - all samples are RNA

variables.name: ATP_PER_CELL_COUNT
variables.description: ATP level adjusted by number of cells reflecting energy status of LCLs for sample - positive number with values from ATP average of duplicate luminescence readings from ATP assay, corrected for concentration of cells by dividing by cell count (see PMIDs 26022996, 28418402, and 3011591 for further details) for sample

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected - all are LCLs made from peripheral blood

variables.name: CELL_COUNT
variables.description: LCL cell count at harvest reflecting growth rate for sample - positive number with values from viable cell count at harvest x10^6 (24 hrs after 0.250 x 10^6 cells/ml) (see PMIDs 26022996, 28418402, and 3011591 for further details) for sample

variables.name: EXPRESSION_RNAseq_BATCH
variables.description: RNAseq batch (1-4) in which sample was RNAsequenced

variables.name: EXPRESSION_SERVICE
variables.description: Name of the service provider which ran the RNAseq - UMGC = University of Minnesota Genomics Center (formerly BMGC = Biomedical Genomics Center)

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample -- all RNA samples from LCLs

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID - sample ID incorporates MGS prefix, then RUCDR ID (SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID), and also wave-tech-sample - namely growing wave number or letters (with the "w"

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, sex, subject source, source subject ID, subject source 2, and source subject ID 2 of participants with or without schizophrenia and involved in the "Gene Expression in an African American Schizophrenia Dataset" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository - also known as DNA_ID, the ID number assigned by the RUCDR to this subject DNA specimens and LCLs (lymphoblastoid cell lines)

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID2
variables.description: Submitted_subject_ID for GAIN2 (dbGaP study ID phs000021) vs. NIMH_nonGAIN_Schizophrenia (dbGaP study ID phs000167)

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID - also known as the GAIN/nonGAIN ID, this is the 5 digit ID you will find in GAIN and nonGAIN data (i.e., GWAS data deposited into dbGaP). GAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000021; nonGAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000167.

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate -- all from RUCDR (Rutgers University Cell and DNA Repository)

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE2
variables.description: Name of dbGaP GWAS for subject - GAIN2 = GAIN = dbGaP study ID phs000021 - NIMH_nonGAIN_Schizophrenia = nonGAIN = dbGaP study ID phs000167

tables.description: Subject ID, affection status, race, age, principal component 1 of 2, principal component 2 of 2, and EBV load (viral load) of LCL of participants with or without schizophrenia and involved in the "Gene Expression in an African American Schizophrenia Dataset" project.

variables.name: AA_PC_1
variables.description: AA PC (principal component 1 of 2)

variables.name: AA_PC_2
variables.description: AA PC (principal component 2 of 2)

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for schizophrenia

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Subject age at sample collection

variables.name: EBV_LOAD
variables.description: EBV load (viral load) of LCL

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Race of participant

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID

tables.description: Subject ID and sample ID of participants with or without schizophrenia and involved in the "Gene Expression in an African American Schizophrenia Dataset" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID - sample ID incorporates MGS prefix, then RUCDR ID (SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID), and also wave-tech-sample - namely growing wave number or letters (with the "w"

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID - also known as the GAIN/nonGAIN ID, this is the 5 digit ID you will find in GAIN and nonGAIN data (i.e., GWAS data deposited into dbGaP). GAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000021; nonGAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000167.
